description: Analyze Social Media workflows with JustOneAPI, including cross-Platform Search.

operations.description: Get cross-platform social media search data, including Xiaohongshu, Douyin, Kuaishou, WeChat, Bilibili, Weibo and Zhihu results, for trend research and monitoring.

parameters.description: Access token for this API service.
parameters.name: token

parameters.description:
Search query string. Supports:
- Multiple keywords (AND): keyword1 keyword2
- Multiple keywords (OR): keyword1~keyword2
- Excluded keywords (NOT): required_keyword -excluded_keyword
parameters.name: keyword

parameters.description:
Target social media platform for search filtering.

Available Values:
- `ALL`: All platforms
- `NEWS`: News
- `WEIBO`: Sina Weibo
- `WEIXIN`: Weixin (WeChat)
- `ZHIHU`: Zhihu
- `DOUYIN`: Douyin (TikTok China)
- `XIAOHONGSHU`: Xiaohongshu (Little Red Book)
- `BILIBILI`: Bilibili
- `KUAISHOU`: Kuaishou
parameters.name: source

parameters.description: Start time of the search period (yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss). Required for initial request.
parameters.name: start

parameters.description: End time of the search period (yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss). Required for initial request.
parameters.name: end

parameters.description: Pagination cursor provided by the 'nextCursor' field in the previous response.
parameters.name: nextCursor
